heading: API Client
body: The API client is a thin wrapper around Axios. It creates a single axios instance with the base URL from the `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` environment variable (defaulting to `/api`). In Docker, the Dockerfile bakes a placeholder into the JS bundles at build time, and `docker-entrypoint.sh` uses `sed` to replace it with the real URL at container start -- so one image works in any environment. Three API objects -- `guideApi`, `examApi`, and `glossaryApi` -- provide typed methods for every endpoint.
